tasks.heading: No tasks yet
tasks.body: Create your first task for this engagement to start tracking work.

calendar.heading: No events scheduled
calendar.body: Add events to track meetings, deadlines, and milestones for this engagement.

docs.heading: No documents yet
docs.body: Upload documents or generate an AI briefing to get started.

audit.heading: No activity recorded
audit.body: Activity will appear here as the engagement progresses through lifecycle stages.

context.heading: No linked dossiers
context.body: Link relevant countries, organizations, and topics to build the engagement context.

error.tabLoad: Failed to load tab content. Check your connection and try again.
error.transition: Stage transition failed. The engagement may have been updated by another user. Refresh and try again.
error.generateBrief: Briefing generation failed. The AI service may be temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few minutes.

destructive.deleteEngagement: This will permanently delete the engagement and all associated tasks, events, and documents. This action cannot be undone.
destructive.backwardTransition: Moving backward to {{stage}} will not remove any completed work items. A note is recommended to explain the reason.
